gloss:
Statement of record: `Eidometry.Thesis.carrier_conservative` (Eidometry thesis, section Executed runs).

The compiler's decidable rational representation of the dynamics agrees exactly with the real-valued semantics: a relation is a congruence over the reals precisely when it is one over the rationals. The executable carrier proves neither more nor less than the real theory.

Discharged by [MTH.R-2026-1203].

statement.pretty: ∀ {S : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype S] (P : S → WMSpec.Compiler.QPMF S) (r : Setoid S), WMSpec.DynCong (fun s => WMSpec.Compiler.QPMF.toReal (P s)) r ↔ WMSpec.Compiler.DynCongQ P r

title: Eidometry.Thesis.carrier_conservative
